description: Analyze 8 weeks of major appliance price tracking data across 4 retailers to determine true total costs, historical price benchmarks, and the current best deal. Account for base prices, taxes, delivery fees, and rebates in your calculations, and evaluate pricing frequency patterns across the dataset.

natural_language.prompt: You have 8 weeks of dishwasher price data from 4 retailers. Calculate the total cost for each entry (including 7% tax, delivery fees, and rebates). Find the best price each retailer has offered, identify the current best deal (Week 8), and determine which retailer most frequently has the lowest price.
